name: Lightning Coil
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Projectile Gems
explicitMods: Adds 1 to 30 Lightning Damage to Attacks
104% increased Armour and Evasion
+78 to maximum Life
-60% to Lightning Resistance
50% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Lightning Damage
flavourText: "There's nothing like imminent death
to galvanize one's purpose in life."
- Malachai the Soulless.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

flavourText: Zana watched in awe as her father spoke. With each word,
he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."
